creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mandree
Date: Wed Mar 25 23:57:32 UTC 2015
New revision: 382279
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/382279

Log:
  Fix build as unprivileged user.
  Add rpm4 as extract requisite, and use rpm2archive to get something that
  yields non-zero-sized manual pages.
  While here, clean up pkg-plist a bit.
  Bump PORTREVISION.

  PR:		196414
  Submitted by:	peterj
  Reviewed by:	xmj
  Approved by:	emulation (eadler)

  head/x11-toolkits/linux-c6-tk85/pkg-plist
